chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 212 of 2019 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For directions For hearing of CMA No.174/2024 (C/A) 16.05.2024 Mr. Nisar Ahmed Bhanbhro, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Niaz Hussain Maitlo, Advocate for respondents-University. Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned Counsel for respondents-University has filed a statement, and submits that compliance has been made and petitioner has been appointed as a Chowkidar (BPS-2) on regular basis vide order dated 29.04.2024; a copy of which he has filed along with the statement. However, learned Counsel for petitioner and petitioner, who is present in Court, both are not satisfied and submit that petitioner was working as an Office Assistant / Senior Clerk, and was to be regularized against the said post. Learned Counsel for University has undertaken that as and when the posts in the Clerk cadre are vacant, petitioner would be promoted as per his qualification in accordance with law. On his statement, petitioner and his counsel show satisfaction. Accordingly, the listed application is disposed of in above terms. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
